Intisarul Azim

Life Science  ·  Plant Pathology  ·  Genomics

A graduate in Agriculture from Bangladesh Agricultural University, building a career at the intersection of Life Science and Genomics. I intend to bridge wet-lab experiments with dry-lab computational analysis to translate genomic and molecular data into biological insights on microorganisms.

Who I Am

About Me

Welcome to my website and hello!

I am Intisarul Azim, an M.S. student in Plant Pathology at Bangladesh Agricultural University. My research combines molecular biology and computational analysis to uncover insights into microorganisms. I have hands-on experience with fungal cultures, DNA extraction, PCR, gel documentation, and bioinformatics workflows for genome assembly and annotation.

I seek to bridge life science and data science, using Ubuntu, fastp, SPAdes, and Prokka for genomics. I hold Google Professional Certificates in Data Analytics, and am skilled in Python, R, Tableau, and Excel for data analysis and visualization.

Outside academia, I co-founded the clothing brand Wear Verse. I also volunteered at BADHAN and HASHIMUKH, supporting blood donation and families in need. Outside of work, I am passionate about sports, especially football.

I welcome any opportunities to connect.
🐍 Plant Science 📊 Programming 🧬 Genomics 📐 Statistical Analysis 🔬 Data Analysis 💼 Business Ownership

Academic Path

Education

A journey built on curiosity, discipline, and a love for science.

2020 – 2025
Bangladesh Agricultural University
Bachelor of Science (Hons.) in Agriculture
📍 Mymensingh, Bangladesh
CGPA: 3.737 / 4.0

Earned a comprehensive degree in Agriculture, acquiring expertise in crop production, protection, and enhancement. Completed coursework across 16 departments, from Agronomy and Soil Science to Plant Pathology and Plant Breeding. All of these disciplines collectively address food scarcity issues.

🌾
📚

Govt. Haji Mohammad Mohsin College
Higher Secondary Certificate
📍 Chattogram, Bangladesh
CGPA: 5.0 / 5.0 · Perfect Score

I have achieved my higher secondary certificate from GHMMC, which helped to mold and shape the person I am today.

2012 – 2016
Chittagong Collegiate School
Secondary School Certificate · Science Group
📍 Chattogram, Bangladesh
GPA: 5.0 / 5.0 · Perfect Score

My five years here were formative. They built the foundational work ethic and scientific curiosity that have guided every step of my career since. I am deeply grateful to this school community for shaping who I am.

Work History

Professional Experience

September 2025 – Present
Graduate Research Assistant
🧪 Plant Bacteriology & Biotechnology Laboratory · Bangladesh Agricultural University

Conducting advanced research on fungal pathogens and their genomic characterization. Responsibilities include establishing and maintaining pure cultures, extracting high-quality DNA, performing PCR amplification and gel electrophoresis analysis. Contributing to scientific manuscript writing and preparation for peer-reviewed publication. Processing raw sequencing data through comprehensive bioinformatics workflows including trimming, assembly, and annotation of prokaryotic and eukaryotic genomes.

April 2025 – June 2025
Intern
🏛️ Upazila Agriculture Office · Dept. of Agriculture Extension · Ministry of Agriculture

Worked as an intern at Upazila Agriculture Office, Melandah, Jamalpur. Gained valuable hands-on experience by applying classroom knowledge in real field situations. Took part in extension work and worked closely with local farming communities.

2022 – 2024
Co-Founder
👕 Wear Verse · Online Clothing Business

Co-founded Wear Verse, a small online clothing business that delivers high-quality customized t-shirts and jackets throughout Bangladesh using Facebook and Instagram. Managed brand identity, customer relations, and daily business operations.

📘 Facebook 📸 Instagram

Research & Data Work

Projects

Hands-on bioinformatics and data analytics work, from genomes to dashboards.

Data Analytics
Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate · Capstone
FitBit Wellness Trend Analysis for Bellabeat

Analyzed FitBit Fitness Tracker data to uncover consumer behavior trends relevant to Bellabeat's marketing strategy, turning raw smart-device data into actionable business insights.

RTableauData Viz
↗
Bioinformatics
Genome Assembly · Illumina Short-Reads
Mycobacterium ulcerans Genome Assembly

Self-directed assembly of M. ulcerans CSURP7741 from Illumina data (SRA: ERR3335404). Full pipeline: FastQC, fastp, SPAdes, QUAST, Bandage, from raw reads to De-novo draft genome.

SPAdesFastQCQUAST
↗
Bioinformatics
Prokaryotic Genome Annotation
M. tuberculosis H37Rv : Structural & Functional Annotation

Full annotation pipeline for M. tuberculosis H37Rv (GCF_000195955.2) using Prokka, BLAST vs UniProt Swiss-Prot, HMMER/Pfam domain prediction, and QUAST quality assessment.

ProkkaBLASTHMMER
↗
Genomics
Viral Genomics · Phylogenetics
SARS-CoV-2 Genomic Assembly, Annotation & Phylogenetics

End-to-end pipeline on Galaxy: Genome assembly, annotation with Prokka, identification of a 4-Amino acid Spike gene insertion, PCR primer design via Primer BLAST, and phylogenetic analysis with MAFFT & FastTree.

GalaxyMAFFTFastTree
↗
Open Resources

Others

Learning materials and notebooks I've made publicly available.

🐍
Jupyter Notebooks

A collection of notebooks covering Pandas, NumPy, Seaborn, and Matplotlib; created during taking courses on Coursera, DataCamp, and YouTube. Primarily for personal reference, but openly shared for anyone who finds them helpful.

Open Drive Link → Google Drive
📊
R Notebooks

Consolidation of R programming fundamentals learned from Coursera, YouTube and other resources. Available in both HTML (browser-viewable) and PDF formats. RStudio is required to modify or reproduce the source files.

Open Drive Link → Google Drive
